_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of the cyber defense Service Provider reporting structure and processes within one’s own organization.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of metrics layer concepts, including semantic layer design, metric definition standards, and how centralized metric definitions prevent inconsistency across reporting tools.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI DA domain. DA-K-010 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-K-007 (OP, cosine: 0.426), SP-T-007 (SP, cosine: 0.424).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.8/10 (raw 0.276). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge, reporting]. DCWF-only terms [cyber, defense, one, organization, own, processes] vs WIDAI-only terms [across, centralized, concepts, definition, definitions, design] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.870 (P=0.875, R=0.865). Balanced P/R — the 15-word DCWF element and 22-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Knowledge of the cyber defense Service Provider reporting structure and processe" and "Knowledge of metrics layer concepts, including semantic layer design, metric def" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.427 > STS 0.276 (gap +0.150). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [knowledge, reporting] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.5%. Shared tokens: [knowledge, reporting]. DCWF-only: [cyber, defense, one, organization, own, processes]. WIDAI-only: [across, centralized, concepts, definition, definitions, design].
